creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Martin,

Martin Etteldorf, 16.12.08, 22:20h CET:

> > any news on this? Can the problem still be reproduced?
> 
> No, but that may have different reasons. I'm meanwhile running 7.1-PRERELEASE
> with mostly up-to-date ports and my own compiled version of xcompmgr instead
> of the one in the ports.

I tried to reproduce the problem you described; I started xcompmgr from
.xinitrc, played a video via mplayer, switched to fullscreen and back
after a few minutes, but didn't see any crash. So, unless you can still
reproduce the problem with xcompmgr from ports, I'd say it's resolved and
close this PR.

Regards,
Stefan
